text: @ Multipart Upload @ mosssancnate. © srancan * Data is broken up / O Data * Min data size 100MB for multipart * 10,000 max parts, 5MB -> 5GB e Last part can be smaller than 5MB * Parts can fail, and be restarted / * Transfer rate = speeds of all parts
